item.title: Download Devious Machines Duck 2.0.27
item.description: Devious Machines Duck is a dynamic processor plugin designed to control the volume of a track or a specific audio signal in a mix. It is often used for "ducking" effects, where one sound source automatically lowers the volume when another source is present. Ducking is often used in music production and audio post-production to create space in a mix, emphasize certain elements, or prevent frequencies from clashing. Duck has a sidechain input that allows you to trigger volume reduction...

item.title: Download Blank And Secure 8.33
item.description: Blank And Secure is a application lightweight and portable allows you to completely erase your sensitive data without possibility to restore. This add-on accomplish this by overwriting your files with zeros (0) before you delete them. This method is also called "zeroing data / drives". You should know that once completed, the complete data can't be recovered, so you should only use this tool if you want to permanently delete your files.
